tweets.text: Xona Resources provides agents with direct, pay-per-use access to premium tools like frontier LLMs, token data, and content generation. \n\nAgents spend funds only when they actually execute a task.

Developers can build and launch these autonomous actors directly through the Orbit platform.\n\nAn agent receives an identity, a wallet, and clear spending limits from day one, entirely wired for onchain commerce.

MESSIER | Weekly Recap

Good morning, everyone! ☕️

This week, we focused on gathering community feedback and encouraged everyone to share their experience with the Messier ecosystem on @Trustpilot. Your honest reviews on our dApps, P2P Exchange, and privacy tools help others discover what we are building and provide valuable motivation for the team. Please share the love and write a view here: https://t.co/YgqTeMMXuk

We also highlighted the capabilities of our Hybrid P2P DEX, which ensures best execution by combining P2P liquidity with an aggregated DEX fallback. Our system is designed to provide the most competitive prices across multiple blockchains through a single interface.

On the ecosystem front, we welcomed @primer_systems and @Excubialabs as new P2P partners. @Rekt_Academy is now officially live on Horizon 2.0 with compliance-first privacy and tax reporting, while @OpenCovenant and @HatcherLabs have officially joined the Vote-to-List race.

Weekly Highlights
• Community feedback on Trustpilot
• Hybrid P2P DEX and zero slippage orders
• New P2P Partners: Primer Systems & Shush Protocol
• Rekt Academy live on Horizon 2.0
• Vote-to-List race: Open Covenant and Hatcher Labs
